Professional Banner Stand Hardware for Indoor Display Applications

Our custom banner stand hardware features a durable steel frame construction with powder-coated finish designed for professional indoor displays, trade shows, and promotional setups. The telescoping pole system with thumbscrew adjustment accommodates custom banner sizes, making it ideal for versatile display applications.

Key Features:

  • Durable steel frame with long-lasting powder-coated finish
  • 13" x 13" stable base for secure indoor placement
  • Telescoping pole with thumbscrew for custom banner sizing
  • Holds one or two banners for flexible display options
  • Professional-grade construction for trade show durability

Product Specifications:

  • Assembled Size: 24" W x 92" H x 13" D
  • Product Weight: 10.25 lbs
  • Base Dimensions: 13" x 13"
  • Material: Steel with powder-coated finish

Order Custom Banner Stand Hardware Today

Ready to enhance your indoor displays with professional banner stand hardware? Our durable steel construction and telescoping design provide the versatility you need for trade shows, retail displays, and promotional events.

Why Choose Our Banner Stand Hardware:

  • Professional Quality: Steel construction with powder-coated finish ensures long-lasting durability
  • Versatile Design: Telescoping pole accommodates custom banner sizes up to 92" height

Our banner stand hardware ships ready for immediate setup with your custom banners. Perfect for trade shows, retail environments, lobbies, and promotional displays where professional presentation matters.

Questions about banner compatibility or setup? Our customer service team of graphic design professionals is available Monday-Friday 8AM-4PM CST to help you select the right hardware for your display needs.

PASTE INTO: Post-Tab Content (Before FAQ) -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== FAQ ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Banner Stand Hardware Questions & Answers

What banner sizes work with this hardware?

The telescoping pole adjusts to accommodate various banner heights up to 92". The 24" width accommodates standard banner widths, and the thumbscrew adjustment ensures proper tension for different banner materials.

How much weight can the banner stand hardware support?

The steel construction and 13" x 13" base provide stable support for standard vinyl, fabric, and mesh banners. The hardware is designed for typical indoor banner weights used in trade shows and retail displays.

Is assembly required for the banner stand hardware?

Minimal assembly is required. The telescoping pole system and thumbscrew mechanism allow for quick setup and banner installation without tools.

Can this hardware hold two banners simultaneously?

Yes, the design accommodates displaying one or two banners, providing flexibility for different promotional and display applications.

What type of indoor surfaces work best for placement?

The 13" x 13" base works well on flat indoor surfaces including carpet, tile, hardwood, and concrete. The stable base design prevents tipping during normal indoor use.

How do I attach banners to the hardware?

Banners with grommets, pole pockets, or other standard banner finishing options work with this hardware system. Contact customer service for specific banner compatibility questions.
